narrative:
Vernon Township has 1,238 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a clear Republican lean of 7.8 percentage points.
